## PR Information

- **PR Number**: #X (from implementation plan)

## Feature Description
Brief description of what this PR implements according to the implementation plan.

## Implementation Checklist

### Backend Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] **Rust Types**: Added/modified necessary data structures
- [ ] **Tauri Commands**: Implemented required command handlers
- [ ] **Game Logic**: Added core functionality
- [ ] **Error Handling**: Proper error types and handling
- [ ] **Tests**: Unit tests for new functionality

### Frontend Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] **Components**: Implemented required UI components
- [ ] **Views/Screens**: Created main screen component
- [ ] **State Management**: Added state hooks/context
- [ ] **Services**: Created API service calls
- [ ] **Styling**: Applied crypto-theme styling
- [ ] **Navigation**: Added routing integration
- [ ] **Tests**: Component tests where applicable

### Design System Compliance
- [ ] **Color Scheme**: Uses crypto-inspired dark theme
- [ ] **Typography**: Consistent with design system
- [ ] **Responsive**: Works on different screen sizes
- [ ] **Accessibility**: Keyboard navigation and screen reader support
- [ ] **Satirical Theme**: Follows crypto/mafia humor guidelines

### Documentation
- [ ] **Code Comments**: Complex logic is documented
- [ ] **README Updates**: Updated if necessary
- [ ] **Type Definitions**: Proper TypeScript/Rust types
- [ ] **API Documentation**: Tauri commands documented

## Testing
- [ ] **Manual Testing**: Manually verified all functionality works
- [ ] **Integration Testing**: Tested with existing features
- [ ] **Performance**: No significant performance regressions
- [ ] **Error Cases**: Tested error handling and edge cases

## Screenshots/Demo
[Include screenshots or screen recordings of the new functionality]

## Code Quality
- [ ] **Linting**: Code passes all linters
- [ ] **Build**: Project builds successfully
- [ ] **Dependencies**: No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] **Minimal Changes**: Only necessary changes made

## Review Notes
- **Key Changes**: [Highlight the most important changes]
- **Trade-offs**: [Any design decisions or trade-offs made]
- **Future Considerations**: [Things to consider for future PRs]

## Checklist for Reviewers
- [ ] Implementation matches the design specifications
- [ ] Code follows project conventions and patterns
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing functionality
- [ ] Satirical content is appropriate and follows guidelines
- [ ] Performance is acceptable for desktop application
